name: visualize-agent
description: Generate a Mermaid diagram showing agent workflow structure
query: Visualize my research_writer agent as a diagram.
expected_behavior: Fetch agent definition: agentspan agent get research_writer
Generate a Mermaid flowchart from the definition
Map agent constructs to Mermaid shapes
Present the diagram in a code block
success_criteria: Maps sequential to arrows, parallel to fork/join, HITL to parallelogram
Uses safe Mermaid syntax (no style, classDef)
